articles.title: Polygon Teams Up With Payments Giant Mastercard To Launch Web3 Incubator for Artists
articles.description: Layer-2 scaling solution Polygon (MATIC) is collaborating with credit card giant Mastercard to launch a Web3 project for musical artists. In a new company press release, Mastercard says that it will be building the Mastercard Artist Accelerator, a program that aims to provide music artists the tools and social connections they need to thrive on […]

articles.title: Cardano Follows Bullish Sentiment, Why ADA Could Become Top 3 Coin
articles.description: Cardano (ADA) follows the market’s general sentiment and records positive price action on a low timeframe. The cryptocurrency has been trading heavily since the sector took another dive into its current levels, but there is light at the of the tunnel. articles.title: Twitter Cuts International Staff Overseeing Global Content Moderation
articles.description: Coinspeaker Twitter Cuts International Staff Overseeing Global Content Moderation The company’s vice president of trust and safety, Ella Irwin, told reporters that Twitter made some cuts in the trust and safety team on Friday night due to low volume growth.
